message:
chore: update checksums for 5 fixed installer scripts

Updated SHA256 hashes for installer scripts that were fixed:
- ubs: auto-detect CI mode, skip ast-grep gracefully
- caam: skip cosign in CI, fall through to checksum-only
- gemini_patch: exit 0 when gemini CLI not installed in CI
- mdwb: auto-detect CI for unattended install
- sbh: use cargo install --git instead of crates.io

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -32,7 +32,7 @@ installers:
